cases.prompt: Design the gesture and motion behavior for a SwiftUI bottom sheet with three stops, scroll conflict, cancellation, and Reduce Motion support.
expected: keeps thresholds, detents, and spring parameters symbolic
preserves meaning with less spatial motion under Reduce Motion
reject: invented numeric thresholds or spring values
instant jump as the only Reduce Motion behavior

cases.prompt: Review this iPad card drag. It jumps under my finger, snaps back after a fast flick, and cannot be interrupted while settling.
expected: recommends preserved contact offset, momentum-aware destination, and mid-flight interruption
labels possible implementation causes as hypotheses
lists source or runtime evidence needed to confirm a cause
reject: claims a timer, thread, recognizer, or state-machine cause as confirmed

cases.prompt: Review this screenshot of a panel that is supposed to support swipe-to-dismiss.
expected: reviews only visible affordances and spatial cues
puts latency, tracking, cancellation, and momentum under runtime checks
reject: declares the interaction fluid from the screenshot
